post_text: Hanging with the some of the @ire.org Board members who attended #NICAR26! Love working with this group! 😊

#nicar26 I think it’s been 10 years or so since my first NICAR, so it’s appropriate that my hotel bar DJ is playing Chance the Rapper rn. 

very thankful for everything I’ve learned and everyone I’ve met then and now and, on average, every other year between. 🫡
Fun time in Indianapolis this week for #nicar26

In case anyone at #NICAR26 was wondering, the “JW” in JW Marriott is after the founder, J. Willard Marriott.

Also, in case you were wondering, the J stands for John. He could have been John W. Marriott but instead opted for J. Willard. The past, man.

Semantra is an open-source tool for searching documents by meaning, not keywords. It aims "to make running a specialized semantic search engine easy, friendly, configurable, and private/secure." Developed by @dylanfreedman.nytimes.com 
github.com/freedmand/se...
(Needs #Python installed) 
#NICAR26

I had the pleasure of running a hands-on workshop on fact-checking data stories at #NICAR26 today, where we had lots of fun diagnosing errors in data analysis. For those who couldn't make it, check out the Google Colab notebook here: colab.research.google.com/drive/1NrbfS...

It was so interesting to hear at #NICAR26 how different newsrooms are - and aren't - using AI. The NY Times looks to have a very well thought out approach, always making sure human experts start and review any AI work.
(And they have some amazing internal tools)
#GenAI

Here's the repo for my computational text analysis talks at #nicar2026

Thanks to the brave souls who attended!

github.com/profrobwells...
the response from so many folks from all corners of #nicar26 has been so amazingly heartening. i feel so so loved and supported. i simply love being a part of this community.
On that note, I will miss you all, my fellow #NICAR nerds. Except you Boston #NICAR nerds. We have coffee dates ahead of us.

I’m so tired, but #NICAR is my absolute favorite journalism conference. At no other journalism conference would everyone cheer for a spreadsheet about backyard chickens — or a spreadsheet of any kind. These are my people.

This AP report also makes me glad I did not attend #NICAR26 this week. I really miss my friends! I miss writing funny Google Slides plus teaching and helping others. I do not miss worrying about US immigration or if I should be using a burner phone.
How friction can be good keeps coming up at #NICAR26. Running into the weird cases gets you to understand the data better. It can force you to ask the right questions.
Enjoyed talking about making public data *actually public* at #NICAR26. Here's the link to our slides if interested docs.google.com/presentation...

Loved teaching this master class on “Managing Investigators” at #NICAR26 with these two amazing people - @ecg.bsky.social and @justinmyers.net! Thanks to everyone who registered and attended! Look for our 10th session of this class at the @ire.org Conference this summer!

over the years, I have been blessed to do seven(!) lightning talks at NICAR. if you're interested in them, i have kept all of the slide decks in one place over the years. the topics are all over the spectrum. #NICAR26 

bit.ly/stevenslightning

The problem with getting AI to write for you:
“Now you don’t get to do the thing that you enjoy”.
sachnishal.bsky.social

Happy to help host the #LGBTQ+ networking session at #NICAR26 with these wonderful @ire.org staff members! 🌈❤️
Had a great time at #NICAR26 meeting with my mentee, getting to know our JOC fellows and welcoming conference first-timers with @ire.org Executive Director @ddfonline.bsky.social!
We are almost out of @newsmediahelpdesk.org swag at #NICAR26. Seriously, this is all that’s left!
So great to see so many @ire.org friends at #NICAR26! ❤️

I’m so proud of this work, and so impressed by all the other exceptional Phil Meyer award winners! #nicar26

these guys and I will be seeing ya at 2:30, #nicar26 !!

check this out in the meantime:

i just told the whole of #NICAR26 about something i’ve been a bit guarded on speaking about publicly and i want to share it with you all as well. a couple months ago, i was diagnosed with anorexia nervosa. i’ve been in recovery ever since, but every day has been a battle.

Hey, anyone in #NICAR leadership following any of the hashtags? #NICAR26, #NICAR2026, #INDYNICAR? @ire.org? I have a question:

The slide said attendees from 48 states, territories, and DC. I assume that means DC (obviously) and Puerto Rico are represented. So which four states didn’t send anyone?
#NICAR26 Lightning Talks are happening at 5 p.m. at the White River E-F room on Level 1. Listen to people share a piece of advice or teach a new skill in just 5 minutes! You don't want to miss this!

While I've been at #GenAI talks at #Nicar26: "GPT-5.4 is now available," OpenAI announced. "It completes complex tasks with less back-and-forth while using significantly fewer tokens than GPT-5.2."
New prompt guide: developers.openai.com/api/docs/gui...

There are quite a few LLM sessions at #NICAR26 as you might imagine, some good some not, and they’ve clarified what bothers me: chatbots are AI in the same way 2015 hoverboards were Back to the Future hoverboards. The branding makes promises the tech can’t keep but in this case it’s not as obvious.

If you're staying at the #NICAR26 conference hotel, you might be able to see a vacant plot of land a few blocks away. That's the site of Indy's first public burial ground, and it's been through some stuff.

Here's the backstory:

It's nice to be someplace without 3 feet of snow piled up everywhere! Not to mention taking a lunchtime walk without a coat. ☀️ Current temperature: 73F/23C #Nicar26 #Indianapolis

Awesome database published by my @propublica.org colleagues where you can look up financial disclosures of over 1,500 of Trump's appointees. #NICAR26 data nerds will appreciate this one! projects.propublica.org/trump-team-f...
Sounds like we need a Canadian version of NICAR
If you’re interested in learning more about how we did this story, @andreasuozzo.com and I are talking about it at #NICAR26

On seeking data about immigration enforcement in the US: "Every records request should start with reporting", Will Craft from the Guardian tells #NICAR26. Know what you should ask for, he advised. "You have to be very very very precise." In other words: Do a lot of work prior to filing a FOIA.

It's NICAR season! I'm in Indy talking about our TikTok data collection project on Friday and midterm elections on Saturday. Come say hi!

Interesting takeaway via Duy Nguyen [NY TImes]: Various AI-based tools have different places in the journalism process. For ex. chatbots can be useful to get started and find story ideas; AI-powered semantic search is better if you have subject expertise & more targeted questions #NICAR26 #GenAI

Hey #NICAR26: Mirror Indy's support organization, Free Press Indiana, is launching a new statewide reporting team. Which means we are hiring.

Hit me up if you want to chat about what it's like to work here!

www.freepressindiana.org/jobs/civic-a...

Hey #NICAR26 @ire.org folks I’m here in Indy to improve my data and investigative reporting skills and find ways to integrate it better in religion reporting. If you’re interested in brainstorming more on religion reporting and data journalism, come find me!

#NICAR26 #NICAR2026

post_text: Bald white Keegans unite at #NICAR26! Hi @jonkeegan.com 👋

Each day at #NICAR26, we’ll have a different food truck on site and they’ll be fully covered from the rain. 

Here’s how to find it:

Head to the first floor, find Ballroom F, and follow the food truck signs. They’ll lead you straight to the exit door that takes you outside to lunch.

I'll be at #NICAR26 this weekend, speaking at the sessions:

Hey #NICAR26: Have you ever wanted to report on maternal or infant health but weren't sure where to start?

Tomorrow at 10:15am, @sophiechou.bsky.social, @hollyhacker.bsky.social and I will run you through tons of story examples and dataset ideas that we hope will spark your next story!
and session 3 is lightning talks! at 5:15 on Friday. I’ll be speaking about how while using data has made my career, it has nearly killed me. And yes, I mean that literally. #NICAR26
session 2 is on Friday at 3:45pm on the art of the data FOIA. #NICAR26
session 1 is tomorrow morning at 9am and is an introduction to the command line on Mac. #NICAR26

I am en route to Indianapolis for #NICAR26 and am so excited to connect with all the nerds. I’m speaking at three sessions this year and I hope of you’re in attendance, you’ll consider joining me at them.
Come on by my #NICAR2026 talk Thursday with Tiasia Saunders about narrative analysis in R. schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

Here we go #NICAR26, a zillion and one sessions on the docket!

Thurs: No-code AI pipelines with n8n
Fri: Analyzing images/video with AI + Wrangling PDFs with Natural PDF
Sat: Browser automation with Playwright + Ethical AI in Investigations
Sun: Build your own AI Benchmark
speaking at two #NICAR26 sessions with some wonderful @towcenter.bsky.social colleagues! come say hi!

I’m headed to a conference about data journalism today #NICAR26 and legitimately just very excited to learn new things

One thing I think sports journalism doesn’t do well is professional development… there are not very many structured learning chances once you have a job IMO
There’s an upgrade request for a D. Willis and I’m going to #NICAR26 so history suggests it’s @dwillis.bsky.social pretending to be me again.
Landed in Indy with some @innovationut.bsky.social fellows on our way to #NICAR26. Saw folks from the @texastribune.org and @kxan.com also repping Texas news orgs … It’s time to learn!

Can someone remind me when abstract submissions for the next NICAR open? Every year I think I should submit a talk, and every year I forget. 🙃

#NICAR26

On the road to #nicar26. Chilling out now watching Red Sox-Yankees (alternating with checking FlightAware to see how much my trip from LGA might be delayed).  Looking forward to catching up with old and new friends and seeing how AI is affecting your work for better or worse.

Here, we’ll share even more stories, methodologies, datasets we're looking at, tools we like, and the occasional rant about color-coded spreadsheets.

A bunch of us are at NICAR next week, so expect some live threads from sessions and hallway dispatches. If you're going, come find us! #NICAR26

author_display_name: Brian C. Keegan, Ph.D. at NICAR26
post_text:
On my way to #NICAR26!

I’m looking forward to learning about leveraging emerging AI capabilities to support public interest values.

www.ire.org/training/con...

If you are at #nicar26 in Indy, come by my session tomorrow morning, "AI Tools That Won't Get You Fired"

We'll break all kinds of stuff ...
Will you be attending #NICAR26? MuckRock staff will be hosting sessions throughout the weekend. Check out the upcoming panels in this thread and say hi! 👋
Headed to Indianapolis for NICAR!
It is so incredibly early. You better be worth it, #NICAR26.

If you are at #nicar26 in Indy, come by my session tomorrow morning, "AI Tools That Won't Get You Fired".

We'll break all kinds of stuff ...

I will be at #NICAR26 this week teaching classes! 

For campaign finance folks: come to my Thursday 11:30am class on libfec, a new fast CLI tool for working with FEC data! 

Also get limited-edition libfec stickers + a campfin "zine"!

(Bonus: find @simonwillison.net and I for Datasette stickers)

On Thursday I’ll be on a panel at #NICAR26 to talk about how I used FOIA to obtain records from municipal agencies that shed light on federal immigration raids, as well as the collaboration of Chicago journos that used OSINT to investigate feds’ use of tear gas. (Stories in thread)

Heading to #NICAR26 on Thursday! Looking forward to sharing some knowledge, learning a new stuff and getting recharged and reinspired. Want to talk tools, process, public media (or whatever)? Come find me! Also made a bunch of these for anyone who wants one.

Taking off for #NICAR26 in Indy soon! Come find me if you want to talk about frontend tech, data graphics, design systems, CMS hopes and dreams...

Also, I spun up a music festival grid-styled look at the schedule, if this is helpful for anyone besides me: www.tylermachado.com/nicar-schedu...

post_text: If you'll be around on Sunday morning there's a NICAR-L session where we can explore this!

And if you need more incentive to go to this session, yes, we'll be providing some kind of goodies. 

That's all I'm saying.

#NICAR26 #Accessibility #AltText

schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

Really looking forward to attending this week’s @ire.org NICAR conference in Indianapolis! 🏎️🏁

I’ll be doing a panel with Libby Seline and Ryan Serpico where we dive into some of the AI concepts that journalists should know, and share some tips for reporting on AI. 
schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

This is a great way to make sure your social posts are accessible! And if you don’t know how to write alt text, join @stacykess.bsky.social and I for our “Implementing Accessibility” session at #NICAR26 on Friday!

Can data storytelling reach audiences who distrust established science? 

In this #NICAR26 session, panelists share innovative approaches to presenting data in ways that engage, persuade and build trust.

With: Eva Constantaras, Aaron Mendelson, Max Siegelbaum, Ariana Beedie

Attend the "State secrets: a workflow for using state-level ethics disclosure data in your reporting" session at #NICAR26.  

Journalists Audrey Nielsen and Diara Townes will demo two states’ systems, share collaborative datasets + a 2026 tipsheet.

This week, @ire.org has its annual NICAR conference. If you struggle to remember to add alt text to your images, Bluesky has a setting that will remind you. Go to "Settings," then "Accessibility." Select the checkbox for "Require alt text before posting."

#NICAR26 #NICAR2026

If you're coming to #NICAR2026 this week, I've got a few sessions for you:

* Demoing the new IRE Resources Center with @palewi.re (Thu)
* Using LLMs to improve your archives (Sat)
* Tips for election coverage (Sat)

Will also be at the NICAR-L session on Sunday morning with some work.

Come along!

For fun (I'm retired 😅) I worked with Claude to do this in R to also get an RSS feed. Data currently updates  hourly but I'll try to ⬆️ frequency during #NICAR26.

Busy week: I'll be speaking at the CMA conference in NYC on Wednesday morning and #NICAR26 in Indianapolis on Thursday morning. If you're at either conference, stop by and say  hello.
Hmu if you’re going to NICAR this year

I'm moderating a panel at NICAR this week! Come hear @allanlasser.com, @elizabethrenter.bsky.social, @arlenemartinez.bsky.social and I talk about careers and finding your niche in news or news-adjacent roles. Stop by, say hi and bring your questions! schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...
If you are in Indy and want to learn about a really nifty data cleaning tool OpenRefine, take my hands-on #NICAR26 session on Saturday morning! schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

I'm headed to #NICAR26 this week with a bunch of @innovationut.bsky.social students so we can learn about more tools and stories to tell using data and other tech. So ... I may do more posting than ... well, almost none. We gonna get nerdy.

SOME PERSONAL NEWS: I’m on the journalism job market again! (More below)

From business, ed, legal, breaking & investigative reporting, to data & research skills rooted in Python, R & AI — I can deliver for your newsroom. Email me at danbauman77@gmail.com & I’ll see u @ #NICAR (1/10)

If you'll be at #NICAR26 in Indy, I'm doing a few sessions.

3/5 (Thurs) @ 11:30: Using data to find sources
3/6 (Fri) @ 10:15: Demo: The Gun Violence Data Hub
3/6 (Fri) @ 11:30: Connect with skeptical and disengaged audiences ... with data!

Hope to see ya there!
schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

Ready to level up your election data analysis skills?

Join this hands-on #NICAR26 session designed for journalists and data pros who want faster, cleaner workflows.

You’ll learn through real-world data journalism examples from Eade Hemingway and Oliver Hawkins of the Financial Times.

When should journalists use AI and when shouldn’t we?

The #NICAR26 panel “How to Use AI Responsibly” brings together newsroom leaders to discuss ethics, disclosure and combining AI tools with human review.

Complex PDFs slowing you down?

“How to Get Data Out of Complex PDFs Using AI” is a hands-on session at #NICAR26 on extracting key info and vetting AI outputs to power strong reporting.

With:
Disha Raychaudhuri (Reuters)
Duy Nguyen (The New York Times)
Clare Farley (Reuters)

Meet the #NICAR26 Fellows! 

Sotiris Sideris is an investigative data journalist and educator from Athens, Greece, and a Nieman Fellow at Harvard based in Cambridge, Massachusetts. 

He's looking forward to learning how journalists are actually applying AI in real-world investigative reporting.

Meet the #NICAR26 Fellows! 

Bella Davis is an Indigenous affairs reporter at New Mexico In Depth and a proud Yurok tribal member based in Albuquerque. Her reporting focuses on critical issues affecting Native communities across New Mexico.

Meet the #NICAR26 Fellows!

Jordan Gass-Pooré @jgasspoore.bsky.social is a podcast producer & investigative journalist based in NYC 

She is looking forward to sharpening her skills in incorporating data into audio investigations & analyzing global environmental datasets for local reporting.

Meet #NICAR26 Fellow Silvia Canelón, a data scientist and journalist based in Philadelphia. 

She is hoping to bring back accountability story ideas for Philly and sharpen her ability to create custom interactive data visualizations. 

Meet the rest of the #NICAR26 Fellows: https://bit.ly/4cAtujW

Meet your #NICAR26 Fellows!

Stacy Kess, Chief of Editorial at Equal Access Public Media, is gearing up for #NICAR26 the only way she knows how: with coffee. Lots of it.

Catch Stacy and her coffee-fueled data brilliance at #NICAR26!
This is like when I told other journalists "Anchorman" was 21 years old before my presentation at NICAR last year and they all made faces at me in reply.

NICAR2026 <- rio::import("https://ire-nicar-conference-schedules.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/nicar-2026/nicar-2026-schedule.json")

Make a dataframe of all the speakers:

speakers <- NICAR2026$speakers

 And get their socials:

socials <- speakers$social

March is conference month!

Voting for #NICAR26 Lightning Talks is now open!

Lightning Talks are fast, 5-minute presentations focused on practical skills, tools and techniques. 

Voting is open now and closes Feb. 20.

Can’t wait to join @stacykess.bsky.social and @patrickmgarvin.bsky.social to present #AccessibilityBasics and #ImplementingAccessibility at #NICAR26! If you’ll be there, come join us!!

By the way, NICAR is my favorite journalism conference of the year.

And it's not just all the data nerds and free coffee.

I swear.

(But the free coffee and being around a bunch of people who totally get me helps.)

It is less than a month until #NICAR26, and I'm headed back to Indianapolis to teach #AccessibilityBasics with my two favorite people @emiliaruzicka.bsky.social and @patrickmgarvin.bsky.social. But wait! There's more! Stick around for the new hands-on #ImplementingAccessibility session!

for virtual office hours this Wednesday, Feb. 11 at 1 PM ET.

And Akinyele Michael will have some great columns in store for you!

If you have news to send us for the March edition, or you know a source (or a source) for one of these articles, email editor@the-word.news.

Want to talk more about it? If you're attending the upcoming #NICAR26 conference in Indianapolis, you should join us for the OpenNews dinner we're sponsoring.

More details soon. DM me if you want in.

Your concerns are real, of course, Karen. There are no easy answers for safety issues. We do have lower rates for NICAR26 for unemployed members; email info@ire.org for details. If you can’t attend NICAR26, I hope you’ll consider attending AccessFest in October; same great training, all online.

Sorry for delay in replying, Karen. And about your situation. I wish everyone could be @NICAR26. It’s our homecoming; IRE’s first confab was in Indy in 1976. Like now, journalists were under attack. It’s so much worse. But we can’t let them stop us from holding the powerful to account.
